/** * Creates a matrix using the input array as the underlying data. *
* If an array is created specially in order to be embedded in a * this instance and not used directly, the {@code copyArray} may be * set to {@code false}. * This will prevent the copying and improve performance as no new * array will be built and no data will be copied. * * @param d Data for new matrix. * @param copyArray if {@code true}, the input array will be copied, * otherwise it will be referenced. */
javadoc_after:
/** * Creates a matrix using the input array as the underlying data. *
* If an array is created specially in order to be embedded in a * this instance and not used directly, the {@code copyArray} may be * set to {@code false}. * This will prevent the copying and improve performance as no new * array will be built and no data will be copied. * * @param d Data for new matrix. * @param copyArray if {@code true}, the input array will be copied, * otherwise it will be referenced. * @exception NullArgumentException if d is null */
